summary: Iteration 136: Tested Back Office Admin Panel and Pipeline CRM features. All 25 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests confirmed login, Pipeline CRM tab with funnel stats, Usuarios tab with user management, and Auditoria tab all working correctly.

issues: Stock limitado popup modal appears on page load - can be dismissed with X or Escape

seed_data_creation: Test users and leads created during testing with TEST_ prefix for identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Back Office Panel at /backoffice is fully functional. Admin login uses /api/gestion/auth/login. Backoffice APIs are at /api/backoffice/*. Pipeline stages: lead, contacto, estudio, propuesta, contrato, instalacion, activacion, activo, cancelado. Client activation requires lead to be in instalacion or activacion stage. ZIP downloads work at /api/descargas/{filename}.zip

backend_tests: POST /api/gestion/auth/login with admin credentials - returns token with rol admin - PASSED
POST /api/gestion/auth/login with wrong password - returns 401 - PASSED
POST /api/gestion/auth/login with nonexistent user - returns 401 - PASSED
POST /api/backoffice/usuarios with invalid rol - returns 400 - PASSED
GET /api/backoffice/usuarios - returns usuarios array with stats - PASSED
PUT /api/backoffice/usuarios/{id}/resetear-password - returns new temp password - PASSED
POST /api/backoffice/pipeline (create lead) - returns lead_id and etapa=lead - PASSED
GET /api/backoffice/pipeline - returns leads array with stage_counts - PASSED
PUT /api/backoffice/pipeline/{id}/estudio - saves estudio de seguridad - PASSED
PUT /api/backoffice/pipeline/{id}/activar-cliente (full flow) - creates client credentials - PASSED
Audit logs created after user creation - PASSED
